data.title: What's Going On With Vista Energy Shares Wednesday?
data.description: Vista stock is trading higher on Wednesday after the company announced it will acquire Petronas E&P Argentina.

data.title: 11th Benzinga Fintech Deal Day & Awards Returns To NYC, November 10: Award Applications Now Open
data.description: Benzinga's flagship Fintech Deal Day & Awards is back in New York City this November. Applications are now open for the 11th annual competition recognizing innovation in financial technology.

data.title: Netflix Q1 Earnings Preview: No Subscriber Figures, Experts See Shares As 'Safer Haven In This Tariff War Environment'
data.description: Without a break out of subscriber figures, investors and analysts could be looking to future guidance and monetization efforts when Netflix reports Q1 results.

data.title: What's Going On With Treasure Global Shares Wednesday?
data.description: Treasure shares are moving higher on Wednesday after the company announced it has secured an exclusive partnership with Mezzofy.

data.title: Intermodal Strength Drives J B Hunt Transport's Q1 Beat, Says Analyst
data.description: J.B. Hunt Transport Services Inc (NASDAQ:JBHT) beat Q1 FY25 earnings forecasts with $1.17 EPS, driven by strong intermodal growth and lower ICS losses. Stephens analyst Justin Long reiterated an Overweight rating but trimmed the price target to $165. JBI volumes rose 7.6% year-over-year, contributing to the upside, while Final Mile and Truckload segments underperformed.
